task_completion.description: Open the '4StoreyBuilding' project and locate the target Middle Floor HVAC systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: eQUEST window is open showing '4StoreyBuilding' in the title bar or project tree. The component tree or Air-Side HVAC System Parameters window displays the target systems (M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25).

task_completion.description: Change the Heat Source to Heat Pump for the target systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Heat Source' (or HEAT-SOURCE) dropdown or property field for the target systems is visibly set to 'Heat Pump' (or 'HEAT-PUMP').

task_completion.description: Set the Heating EIR to 0.30488 and Min HP Temp to 17 for the target systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Heating EIR' (or HEATING-EIR) field is set to '0.30488' and the 'Min HP Temp' (or MIN-HP-T) field is set to '17' in the system properties.

task_completion.description: Set the Supp Heat Source to Electric for the target systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Supp Heat Source' (or HP-SUPP-SOURCE) field is visibly set to 'Electric' in the system properties.

task_completion.description: Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST simulation dialog is visible, showing a progress bar, simulation running status, or a 'Simulation Complete' message for the DOE-2.2 engine.
The agent clicks the 'Save' icon (floppy disk), uses the 'File -> Save' menu option, or a save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the eQUEST graphical user interface to modify the parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications are made within the eQUEST application windows and dialogs, not by editing the .inp file directly in a text editor like Notepad or using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The simulation was genuinely executed via the eQUEST interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Run Simulation' button (calculator icon) in eQUEST and the actual eQUEST simulation dialog appears, rather than mocking terminal output.

integrity.description: The modifications are performed on the correct project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The project name '4StoreyBuilding' is consistently visible in the eQUEST title bar or project tree during the modifications and simulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: 4StoreyBuilding. Target Systems: M.S21, M.E22, M.N23, M.W24, M.C25. Required Parameters: Heat Source (HEAT-SOURCE) = 'Heat Pump', Heating EIR (HEATING-EIR) = 0.30488, Min HP Temp (MIN-HP-T) = 17, Supp Heat Source (HP-SUPP-SOURCE) = 'Electric'. The agent must run a DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
